title: A case for LLMs as Self-predictors
summary: A case for LLMs as Self-predictors
whyItMatters: Written as part of the MATS 9.1 extension program, mentored by Richard Ng o. Additional thanks to Maria Kostylew for helpful draft feedback. Introduction This post advocates a perspective of LLMs as seeking to minimise prediction error with respect to their world models.
